properties.remark: SPOTTER REPORTED 40 KNOT WIND GUST AT THE COAST AS THE STORM MOVED ONSHORE.

ROOF PEELED OFF OF A SINGLE WIDE MOBILE HOME AT THE END OF VERGES ROAD IN THONOTOSASSA. SIX PEOPLE WERE INSIDE AND NO INJURIES WERE REPORTED. MEDIA VIDEO...PICTURES AND RADAR DATA (INFLOW NOTCH) STRONGLY SUGGEST THIS WAS A DOWN BURST WIND OF 45-50 MPH AND NOT A TORNADO. NO OTHER DAMAGE WAS REPORTED IN THE AREA.
POSSIBLE TORNANDO TOUCHDOWN. ROOF TORN OFF A SINGLE WIDE TRAILER ON VERGES ROAD IN THONOTOSASSA.
